entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The target legume crop studied for flowering time and flower number modulation

entities.name: CLAVATA SIGNALING
entities.description: A signaling pathway that modulates shoot apical meristem characteristics

entities.name: SHOOT APICAL MERISTEM
entities.description: The primary growth point of the plant that regulates agromorphological traits

entities.name: CLV1-LIKE GENES
entities.description: A group of 142 genes identified in chickpea as part of the CLAVATA signaling pathway

entities.name: CLV2-LIKE GENES
entities.description: A group of 28 genes identified in chickpea as part of the CLAVATA signaling pathway

entities.name: CLV3-LIKE GENES
entities.description: A group of 6 genes identified in chickpea as part of the CLAVATA signaling pathway

entities.name: QTL MAPPING
entities.description: A genomic technique used to identify quantitative trait loci associated with specific traits

entities.name: MAP-BASED CLONING
entities.description: A technique used to isolate a gene within a previously identified QTL

entities.name: ASSOCIATION ANALYSIS
entities.description: A high-resolution genomic analysis used to identify SNP loci associated with traits

entities.name: SNP LOCI
entities.description: Single nucleotide polymorphisms identified within the CaCLV3_01 gene

entities.name: CACLV3_01 GENE
entities.description: A specific gene within the CaqDTF1.1/CaqFN1.1 QTL that modulates flowering and flower number

entities.name: CAQDTF1.1/CAQFN1.1 QTL
entities.description: A major quantitative trait locus associated with days to 50% flowering and flower number

entities.name: DAYS TO 50% FLOWERING
entities.description: The time taken for 50% of the crop to reach flowering stage

entities.name: FLOWER NUMBER
entities.description: The total number of flowers produced by the plant

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE EXPRESSION PROFILING
entities.description: A method used to measure the expression levels of genes

entities.name: MOLECULAR HAPLOTYPING
entities.description: A method used to identify and differentiate genetic haplotypes of a gene

entities.name: SAM WIDTH
entities.description: The physical width of the shoot apical meristem

entities.name: SEED YIELD
entities.description: The total productivity of seeds produced by the plant

entities.name: AGRONOMIC PERFORMANCE
entities.description: The overall performance of the crop in terms of growth and yield

entities.name: FLOWERING PROMOTING GENES
entities.description: Genes that facilitate the transition to flowering
